2606.27629.title: Cross-Platform Chinese Offensive Comment Detection via Dual-Threshold Hard Example Mining
2606.27629.paper_summary: Cross-platform deployment of offensive comment detection for Chinese social media suffers performance degradation. The paper proposes a dual-threshold hard mining method to address this. First, the clean-Chinese-base RoBERTa is finetuned on COLD to establish a binary baseline for fair comparison. Second, a three-class fine-labeled test set covering Weibo, Xiaohongshu, Tieba, and Zhihu is constructed, domain distances from the source are quantified using Jaccard and Proxy-A Distance, as well as the degradation bottleneck of the baseline under domain shift is systematically revealed. Herein, a dual threshold hard example mining strategy is proposed. High- and low-confidence error-prone samples are filtered from unlabeled corpora by prediction confidence. The model is secondarily finetuned under implicit contexts with merely a small set of manually labeled hard examples, realizing low-cost cross-platform domain adaptation. Experiments reveal significant performance gains of the optimized model across four platforms.
2606.27629.paper_summary_zh: 跨平台的攻擊性評論檢測在中文社交媒體上遭遇性能下降。本文提出了一種雙閾值硬挖掘方法來解決這個問題。首先，對於COLD進行微調的clean-Chinese-base RoBERTa被用來建立一個二元基準，以便進行公平比較。其次，構建了一個涵蓋微博、小紅書、贴吧和知乎的三類細標註測試集，通過Jaccard和Proxy-A距離量化來源的領域距離，同時系統性地揭示了在領域轉移下基準的降級瓶頸。在此，提出了一種雙閾值硬樣本挖掘策略。通過預測置信度，從未標註的語料中過濾出高置信度和低置信度的錯誤樣本。該模型在隱式上下文中進行二次微調，僅使用一小組手動標註的硬樣本，實現了低成本的跨平台領域適應。實驗顯示，優化模型在四個平台上均顯著提高了性能。
2606.27629.author: Ruixing Ren et.al.
2606.27629.authors: Ruixing Ren, Junhui Zhao, Fangfang Wang
